title: Top-Down Proteomics of Medicinal Cannabis.
author: Vincent D Binos S Rochfort S Spangenberg G
content: S-EPMC6958505 PMC6958505 Top-Down Proteomics of Medicinal Cannabis. The revised legislation on medicinal cannabis has triggered a surge of research studies in this space. Yet, cannabis proteomics is lagging. In a previous study, we optimised the protein extraction of mature buds for bottom-up
